prompts.text: "Barcode" — the stripy pattern that tells the scanner what the item is. Every product has its own unique barcode.
Before scanning, ask: "Do you think this is the right one? How can you tell?"
Use sequencing language: "First we chose the list, then we found the items, now we're scanning them — nearly done!"
Ask: "How many items do we still need to find? How many have we scanned?"
